name: migration-test-must-keep-old-ddl
tags: migration test isolation ddl schema inline pre-migration task:cb357eb6
body:
Migration tests must keep the old pre-migration DDL inline — never replace it with the canonical DDL from schema.py.

**Why:** If you substitute the canonical (post-migration) DDL, the migration code never runs because the schema already has the new columns. The test becomes a no-op and passes vacuously.

**How to apply:** Any test named `test_migration_*` or that verifies `ALTER TABLE` backfill behavior must build the DB using the old schema manually, then call the prod migrate function.
